chunks.text: Andrew Ng on why Artificial Intelligence is the new electricity - EECS at Berkeley CS alumnus Andrew Ng (Ph.D. ’02), Chief Scientist at Baidu, founder of Google Brain, co-founder of Coursera, and Stanford adjunct professor, describes in a video on Inside HPC how artificial intelligence is transforming the industrial landscape. He compares the impact of AI to that of electricity, which radically transformed industry after industry when it was introduced. Categories Alumni Industry Research View Open Faculty Positions
